home.title: Ella Maria Grosz | Contemporary Oil Painter Portfolio
home.description: Ella Maria Grosz is a contemporary oil painter based in London, specializing in layered oil paintings that capture fleeting moments of light and shadow. Explore her portfolio of oil paintings and mixed media works.

hero.heading: Plovdiv, 2023
hero.subheading: Featured Oil Painting by Ella Maria Grosz
hero.tooltip: This painting captures the essence of Plovdiv's ancient architecture and vibrant street life through layered oil techniques. Oil on canvas, 120x80cm, 2023.

about.heading: Quiet reflections in oil and linen.
about.p1: Based in London, Ella Maria Grosz's practice is defined by a meticulous approach to layered oil painting. Her work seeks to capture the fleeting moments of light and shadow that define our domestic spaces, elevating the mundane to the monumental through rigorous classical technique.
about.p2: Across studio-based series and curated exhibitions, she explores the tension between memory and material, using subtle palette shifts and layered brushwork to create immersive compositions that resonate at both intimate and grand scales.
